messages.content: Yes. We updated \DATA\ using superior captions generated by Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B, which yield notable gains (Tab.~\ref{tab:REBUTTAL_main_exp}). We thanks for the inspired idea which further supports our motivation. 润色

Here are a few options ranging from standard academic to more concise styles.

**Option 1: Professional & Polished (Recommended)**
> "Following your suggestion, we updated \DATA\ using superior captions generated by Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B, which resulted in notable gains (see Tab.~\ref{tab:REBUTTAL_main_exp}). We appreciate this insightful recommendation, as it further validates our motivation."

**Option 2: Concise & Direct (Good for word limits)**
> "We updated \DATA\ utilizing high-quality captions from Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B, yielding significant improvements (Tab.~\ref{tab:REBUTTAL_main_exp}). We thank the reviewer for this constructive suggestion, which strengthens our proposed approach."

**Option 3: Slightly more conversational (Closer to your original)**
> "Yes, we have updated \DATA\ with improved captions generated by Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B. As shown in Tab.~\ref{tab:REBUTTAL_main_exp}, this yields notable performance gains. We are grateful for this inspiring idea, which further supports our motivation."

**Key Changes Made:**
*   **Grammar:** Changed "We thanks for" (incorrect) to "We appreciate," "We are grateful for," or "We thank the reviewer for."
*   **Vocabulary:** Changed "inspired idea" (a bit flowery) to "insightful recommendation," "constructive suggestion," or "inspiring idea" (if you want to keep the original sentiment).
*   **Flow:** Connected the sentences to show cause and effect (i.e., we did X, which resulted in Y).

**Note:** Please double-check the model name **"Qwen3"**. If you meant **"Qwen2"** or **"Qwen2.5"** (since Qwen3 is not widely public yet), ensure you correct the typo.
